title: anthyllis vulneraria proles scardica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria proles scardica, also known as Scardica or Balkan kidney vetch, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, traditionally used in folk medicine. It has been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of this plant are said to include the treatment of wounds, ulcers, and infections, as well as its potential to improve blood circulation and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Anthyllis vulneraria proles scardica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
